title: Toolchain Selection, Compatibility, and Reproducible Setup · Risk Brief: Tool Overlap
summary: Select a minimal compatible toolchain and prove clean-machine setup. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates tool overlap increment in a pinned bootstrap and compatibility matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose tools with clear ownership and minimal duplicate diagnostics.
Commit appropriate lockfiles and verify deterministic clean installs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
